parameters.query:
INSERT INTO main.tickets (
  company_id, solution_id,
  title, description, priority, status,
  module, request_type, case_type,
  channel, zoho_ticket_id,
  ai_summary, ai_sentiment,
  sla_response_due, sla_resolution_due, sla_status,
  created_by_email, created_by_name, created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json._insert.company_id ? $json._insert.company_id : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json._insert.solution_id ? $json._insert.solution_id : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json._insert.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json._insert.description ? "'" + $json._insert.description + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json._insert.priority }}',
  'Open',
  {{ $json._insert.module ? "'" + $json._insert.module.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json._insert.request_type ? "'" + $json._insert.request_type + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json._insert.case_type ? "'" + $json._insert.case_type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'email',
  '{{ $json._insert.zoho_ticket_id }}',
  {{ $json._insert.ai_summary ? "'" + $json._insert.ai_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json._insert.ai_sentiment ? "'" + $json._insert.ai_sentiment + "'" : "'neutral'" }},
  {{ $json._insert.sla_response_due ? "'" + $json._insert.sla_response_due + "'::timestamptz" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json._insert.sla_resolution_due ? "'" + $json._insert.sla_resolution_due + "'::timestamptz" : 'NULL' }},
  'healthy',
  {{ $json._insert.created_by_email ? "'" + $json._insert.created_by_email + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json._insert.created_by_name ? "'" + $json._insert.created_by_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json._insert.created_at ? "'" + $json._insert.created_at + "'::timestamptz" : 'NOW()' }}
)
ON CONFLICT (zoho_ticket_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id

UPDATE main.tickets
SET clickup_task_id = '{{ $json.id }}',
    clickup_url = '{{ $json.url }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Insert Ticket to DB').first().json.id }}

SELECT
  c.id AS company_id,
  c.company_code,
  c.company_name,
  c.domain,
  s.id AS solution_id,
  s.solution_code,
  s.solution_name,
  s.business_hours_start,
  s.business_hours_end,
  s.timezone,
  s.clickup_space_id,
  s.clickup_list_id,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'priority', sc.priority,
      'priority_name', sc.priority_name,
      'response_hours', sc.response_hours,
      'resolution_hours', sc.resolution_hours,
      'resolution_type', sc.resolution_type
    )) FROM main.sla_configs sc WHERE sc.solution_id = s.id),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS sla_configs,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'module_code', m.module_code,
      'module_name', m.module_name
    )) FROM main.modules m WHERE m.solution_id = s.id),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS modules,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'id', rt.id,
      'request_type', rt.request_type,
      'sla_applicable', rt.sla_applicable
    )) FROM main.request_types rt WHERE rt.solution_id = s.id),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS request_types
FROM main.companies c
JOIN main.solutions s ON s.company_id = c.id AND s.is_active = true
WHERE c.domain = '{{ $('Code in JavaScript1').first().json.contact.domain }}'
  AND c.is_active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS ticket_id, zoho_ticket_id, channel
FROM main.tickets
WHERE zoho_ticket_id = '{{ $json.zoho_ticket_number }}'
  AND (is_deleted = false OR is_deleted IS NULL)
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO main.threads (
  ticket_id, action_type, actor_email, actor_name,
  raw_content, has_attachments, thread_source,
  metadata, created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $('Find Ticket by Zoho ID').first().json.ticket_id || 0 }},
  'customer_reply',
  {{ $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.actor_email ? "'" + $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.actor_email + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.actor_name ? "'" + $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.actor_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.content_text ? "'" + $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.content_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.has_attachments || false }},
  'zoho',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ zoho_thread_id: $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.thread_id, direction: $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.direction }) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $('Parse Thread Payload').first().json.created_at }}'::timestamptz
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING id
